memo_text:
CATEGORY: HR
CURRENT TOOL: PeoplePulse (£385/mo)
COMPETITOR: WorkForge (£420/mo)
DATE: 2024-11-12

PUSH SIGNALS:
  - GDPR right-to-erasure requests must be handled manually via support ticket [HIGH — compliance risk; GDPR requirement per hr.md]
  - UK payroll integration with PayAxis requires a middleware connector that breaks quarterly [HIGH — operational reliability risk]
  - Onboarding workflows require manual setup per new hire — no templates [MEDIUM — HR overhead]
  - Performance review module outdated — no continuous feedback, team reverted to Google Form [MEDIUM — adoption failure]

PULL SIGNALS:
  - "automated GDPR right-to-erasure processing" [HIGH — resolves #1 push; compliance requirement met]
  - "native PayAxis integration on all tiers" [HIGH — resolves #2 push; no middleware required]
  - "Onboarding workflow templates (15 templates included)" [MEDIUM — resolves #3 push]
  - "Continuous performance feedback module" [MEDIUM — addresses adoption gap]
  - Compliance: SOC2 Type II ✓ (renewed Oct 2024), SSO (SAML) ✓, UK/EU residency ✓ [ALL CLEAR — no hard blocks]
  - Price increase: £385 → £420/mo (+£35/mo) [NEGATIVE — migration incurs cost increase]

FINANCIAL ANALYSIS:
  Migration cost: 12hrs × £48 = £576 one-time
  Annual saving: -£420 (cost increase)
  Amortised migration: £192/yr over 3 years
  Annual net: -£612
  ROI threshold (£1,200/yr): NOT MET — net is negative
  Operational gain: GDPR automation removes compliance risk and eliminates manual support ticket process. PayAxis native integration removes quarterly middleware failures. Qualitative value is significant but does not offset direct cost increase.
  ROI threshold met: NO (net negative on direct + operational combined)

VERDICT: HOLD

REASSESS CONDITION: PeoplePulse annual contract expires November 2025. Reassess at contract expiry when migration cost can be absorbed into natural renewal cycle and no penalty applies.
REVIEW BY: 2025-10-01

EVIDENCE:
  "automated GDPR right-to-erasure processing"
  "native PayAxis integration on all tiers"
  "Onboarding workflow templates (15 templates included)"
  "Continuous performance feedback module"

hold_data.hold_reason: GDPR right-to-erasure requests must be handled manually via support ticket [HIGH — compliance risk; GDPR requirement per hr.md]
hold_data.reassess_condition: PeoplePulse annual contract expires November 2025. Reassess at contract expiry when migration cost can be absorbed into natural renewal cycle and no penalty applies.
